listitem.para: a nsim x n matrix of doubles, the numbers in the interval [0,1]^n
a p x 1 matrix of floating point integers, dimensions to plot.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Plots the required two dimensionnal projections of u, with size nsim x n, where nsim is the number of simulations and n is the dimension of the space. This function allows to see all the 2 dimensionnal projections of a multivariate vector u.

refsection.title: Examples
